entries.title: HDRI Map Estimation from Single Face Portrait
entries.org: Technical University of Munich · Course project
entries.summary: Current master's course project in Advanced Deep Learning for Computer Vision by Prof. Matthias Nießner
highlights: Generation of dataset and implementation of dataloader (completed)
Implementation of simple encoder decoder architecture and overfitting on small subset of the data (completed)
Architecture refinement and upscaling to the entire dataset
Evaluation and documentation of the results

entries.title: Autonomous Systems: UAV cave exploration
entries.org: Technical University of Munich · Course project
entries.summary: Master's course project in Autonomous Systems by Prof. Markus Ryll
entries.details:
Task: implementation of a control system, able to autonomously navigate a UAV in a cave environment and locate a number of hidden lanterns in a unity simulation 
 
Implemented parts included:
highlights: Perception pipeline generating a voxel occupancy map

entries.title: Adsorption façade: RL based operational strategy
entries.org: Institute for System Dynamics · Bachelor’s thesis · Student research assistant
entries.summary: Further development and optimization of a reinforcement-learning-based operational strategy for an adsorbing building façade.
entries.details: Follow-on from student assistant work and research at ISYS; emphasis on strategy refinement and robustness of the RL control approach.

entries.title: IST project competition
entries.org: Institute for Systems Theory and Automatic Control (IST) · University of Stuttgart
entries.summary: Institute-wide project competition at IST; our team placed second.
entries.details: Team-based competition format with project development and final presentation of results.

entries.title: Faro-Labs: test automation & diagnostics
entries.summary: UI and API tests for embedded firmware plus diagnostics and filtering around SLAM and point clouds.
entries.details: JavaScript UI automation (TestComplete); embedded testing with C++/Python in ROS; system-state monitoring and quality evaluation.
